subject: Invoice not received
body: I made the payment last week but I still have not got my invoice for this month. Please send it soon.

subject: Wrong amount charged
body: My card was charged 1500 rupees but my plan cost is only 999. Please check and refund the extra amount.

subject: Refund delayed
body: I cancelled my subscription 10 days back and was told refund will come in 5-7 days but I have not received it yet.

subject: Subscription renewed without confirmation
body: My yearly plan got renewed automatically and money got deducted. I did not want to renew this time.

subject: Payment failed but amount deducted
body: I tried to pay for the premium plan, the payment page showed failed but the amount was deducted from my account.

subject: Duplicate charge on card
body: I see two charges of the same amount on the same day on my card statement for one single order.

subject: GST invoice missing
body: I need a GST invoice for my last purchase for company reimbursement, can someone share it.

subject: Charged for upgrade I did not request
body: I see an extra charge for plan upgrade on my bill but I never asked to upgrade my plan.

subject: Discount coupon not applied
body: I used a discount coupon at checkout but the final bill did not show any discount applied.

subject: Credit note not received
body: Support said a credit note will be issued for my returned order but it has been 2 weeks and nothing came.

subject: Auto debit failed this month
body: My auto debit for the monthly subscription failed this time and now my account shows suspended.

subject: Refund status update needed
body: Can someone update me on the status of my refund request raised on 3rd of this month.

subject: Change billing cycle
body: I want to change my billing cycle from monthly to yearly, please guide me how to do this.

subject: Overcharged for extra users
body: My plan is for 5 users but I was billed for 8 users this month, please correct this.

subject: Invoice amount mismatch
body: The invoice I got by email shows a different total than what was shown on the payment page.

subject: Update payment method
body: I want to update my saved card details because my old card has expired.

subject: Extra charge for addon feature
body: There is an extra line item in my bill for an addon feature that I never enabled.

subject: Yearly plan invoice needed
body: Please share the invoice copy for my yearly plan purchase, I need it for my records.

subject: Refund not credited to bank
body: Refund shows completed on your dashboard but the amount is not showing in my bank account yet.

subject: Wallet balance not updated
body: I added money to my wallet but the balance is still showing the old amount after 2 hours.

subject: App crashes on login
body: Every time I try to open the app and enter my password it crashes immediately.

subject: Page not loading
body: The dashboard page keeps loading forever and never opens, tried on 2 different browsers.

subject: API returning 500 error
body: We are integrating your API and it keeps returning a 500 internal server error since morning.

subject: Unable to reset password
body: I clicked forgot password multiple times but the reset link email never arrives.

subject: Data not syncing
body: My data is not syncing between the mobile app and the web app, changes on one side do not show on the other.

subject: App very slow after update
body: After the latest update the app has become very slow, every screen takes 10 seconds to open.

subject: OTP not received for login
body: I am trying to log in with OTP but the OTP message is not coming to my phone.

subject: Feature broken after update
body: The export to excel feature stopped working after the recent app update, it just shows a blank file.

subject: Dashboard showing blank screen
body: When I open the analytics dashboard it just shows a blank white screen with no error message.

subject: Mobile app crashes on startup
body: The moment I open the mobile app it closes automatically, this started from yesterday.

subject: Not receiving notifications
body: I have notifications turned on in settings but I am not getting any push notification on my phone.

subject: File upload keeps failing
body: I am trying to upload a pdf file but it keeps failing at 90 percent every single time.

subject: Two factor authentication not working
body: I enabled 2FA and now the app is not accepting the code from my authenticator app.

subject: Data not saving
body: I filled the entire form and clicked save but my data is not getting saved, I have to enter it again.

subject: Search not showing results
body: When I search for an order by its ID the search bar shows no results even though the order exists.

subject: Third party integration broken
body: The Slack integration we set up last month suddenly stopped sending any messages.

subject: App logs out automatically
body: The app is logging me out on its own every few minutes, very annoying to keep logging in again.

subject: 404 error on order page
body: When I click on view order details I get a 404 page not found error.

subject: Website is down
body: Your website is completely down right now, getting a connection timeout error.

subject: Report generation stuck
body: I asked the system to generate a monthly report and it has been stuck at processing for an hour.

subject: Leave balance query
body: Can you tell me how many casual leaves and sick leaves I have remaining for this year.

subject: Salary not credited
body: My salary for this month has not been credited yet, it is usually credited by the 1st.

subject: PF withdrawal status
body: I applied for PF withdrawal 3 weeks ago, can you tell me the current status of my request.

subject: Offer letter request
body: Could HR please share a soft copy of my offer letter, I need it for a visa application.

subject: Reimbursement pending
body: I submitted my travel reimbursement bills last month but the amount has not been reimbursed yet.

subject: Work from home policy question
body: I wanted to know the current work from home policy and how many days per month are allowed.

subject: Leave approval pending
body: I applied for leave for next week but my manager has not approved it yet, can HR follow up.

subject: Referral bonus not credited
body: I referred a candidate 2 months back who joined, but my referral bonus has still not been credited.

subject: Joining formalities question
body: I am joining next Monday, what documents do I need to bring for the joining formalities.

subject: Relieving letter request
body: I resigned last month and my last working day was yesterday, please share my relieving letter.

subject: ESI card issue
body: My ESI card shows wrong details, my date of birth is entered incorrectly, please correct it.

subject: Tax declaration form
body: I want to submit my investment declaration for tax saving, where can I upload the documents.

subject: Increment letter copy
body: Can I get a copy of my increment letter from last appraisal cycle for a loan application.

subject: Attendance correction request
body: My attendance is marked absent on a day I was actually present in office, please correct this.

subject: Holiday calendar request
body: Could you share the holiday calendar for this year, I want to plan my leaves.

subject: Background verification status
body: My background verification was started 2 weeks ago, wanted to check the current status.

subject: Insurance policy details
body: I want to know the details of my health insurance policy provided by the company.

subject: Maternity leave process
body: I wanted to understand the process and documents required to apply for maternity leave.

subject: Exit interview schedule
body: I have resigned and wanted to know when my exit interview is scheduled.

subject: Salary slip download issue
body: I am not able to download my salary slip for last month from the portal, it shows an error.

subject: General product question
body: I wanted to know if your product supports multiple languages, can you confirm.

subject: How to use a feature
body: Can someone explain how the reporting feature works, I could not find much in the help section.

subject: Pricing plan details
body: Could you share the detailed pricing for all your plans along with what is included in each.

subject: Demo request
body: We are interested in your product for our team, can we schedule a demo call this week.

subject: Partnership inquiry
body: We run a similar business and wanted to explore a partnership opportunity with your company.

subject: Feedback about product
body: Just wanted to share some feedback, overall the product is good but the mobile app can be improved.

subject: Feature request
body: It would be great if you could add a dark mode option in the app in a future update.

subject: Contact sales team
body: I want to talk to your sales team about a custom enterprise plan for my company.

subject: Documentation link request
body: Could you share a link to the API documentation, I could not find it on the website.

subject: Training session request
body: We just onboarded a new team, is it possible to get a short training session on how to use the tool.

subject: Unsubscribe from emails
body: Please remove me from your marketing email list, I keep getting promotional emails daily.

subject: General inquiry about company
body: I wanted to know more about your company, when was it founded and where is it based.

subject: Career opportunities
body: I am interested in job opportunities at your company, where can I check current openings.

subject: Media inquiry
body: I am a journalist writing an article on this industry and wanted a quote from your team.

subject: Product roadmap question
body: Is there any public roadmap available so we know what features are planned next.

subject: Comparison with competitor
body: How is your product different from other similar tools available in the market.

subject: Free trial extension
body: My free trial is ending tomorrow, is it possible to extend it by a few more days.

subject: Account deletion request
body: I want to permanently delete my account and all my data from your platform.

subject: Data privacy question
body: Can you explain how my personal data is stored and whether it is shared with third parties.

subject: General complaint about service
body: I am not very happy with the overall service quality lately, wanted to raise this as feedback.
